subcodes.first_line: O thou who falleth short in thy correspondence! Thy gracious letter arrived at a most propitious time and brought solace to my heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قاصر از مخاطبت هر عبارتی نامه نامی در بهترین وقتی واصل و مدار تسلی خاطر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @suffering and imprisonment
